title: pyrus hadiensis
intro: Pyrus hadiensis, also known as the Indian plum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, native to the Himalayas and the Indian subcontinent. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pyrus hadiensis include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Pyrus hadiensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or dried powder, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
